name: Chicken Divan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place a layer of cooked broccoli at the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking pan.
3. Arrange a layer of cubed cooked chicken on top of the broccoli.
4. In a bowl, mix together the cream of chicken soup, mayonnaise, and curry powder until well combined.
5. Spread the soup mixture evenly over the chicken.
6. Sprinkle shredded Cheddar cheese and buttered bread crumbs over the top.
7. Place the pan in the preheated oven.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
